mission.title: ollama: Add support for amd Radeon 780M gfx1103 - override works
mission.description: Add support for amd Radeon 780M gfx1103 - override works. Requested by 37+ users.

steps.title: Check current Ollama setup
steps.description:
Verify your Ollama version:
```bash
ollama version
```
This fix adds native support for AMD Radeon 780M (gfx1103) iGPU.

steps.title: Review AMD Radeon 780M support
steps.description:
The AMD Radeon 780M (found in Ryzen 7 PRO 7840U and similar) uses the gfx1103 architecture. Previously, users had to manually set `HSA_OVERRIDE_GFX_VERSION`. This fix codifies the workaround directly into Ollama.

BIOS tip: Set VRAM allocation from 1GB up to 8GB for better performance.

steps.title: Apply the fix
steps.description:
Update to a recent version of Ollama that includes native gfx1103 support.

If on an older version, use the manual workaround:
```bash
HSA_OVERRIDE_GFX_VERSION=11.0.0 ollama serve
```

For Docker:
```bash
docker run -d \
  --device /dev/kfd --device /dev/dri \
  -e HSA_OVERRIDE_GFX_VERSION=11.0.0 \
  -v ollama:/root/.ollama \
  -p 11434:11434 \
  ollama/ollama:rocm
```

steps.title: Verify GPU acceleration
steps.description:
Run a model and check performance:
```bash
ollama run llama3 "Hello!" --verbose
```
Compare the `eval rate` with CPU-only mode to confirm GPU acceleration is active.

resolution.summary: Native support for AMD Radeon 780M (gfx1103) was added to Ollama, codifying the HSA_OVERRIDE_GFX_VERSION workaround so users no longer need to set it manually.

prerequisites.description: A working ollama installation or development environment.
